text_raw: Kliff.
text_clean: Kliff.

text_raw: Tell us what to do.
text_clean: Tell us what to do.

text_raw: How long are we meant to wait here just groping our sacks?
text_clean: How long are we meant to wait here just groping our sacks?

text_raw: You reckon he got nabbed?
text_clean: You reckon he got nabbed?

text_raw: What's taking so bloody long?
text_clean: What's taking so bloody long?

text_raw: Right then, Fort Musket. Let's blow the bloody thing to pieces.
text_clean: Right then, Fort Musket. Let's blow the bloody thing to pieces.

text_raw: Oi, what was that for?
text_clean: Oi, what was that for?

text_raw: About fucking time!
text_clean: About fucking time!

text_raw: Huh? Who the fuck is Caliburn?
text_clean: Huh? Who the fuck is Caliburn?

text_raw: What the hell's going on?
text_clean: What the hell's going on?

text_raw: Where's Kliff gone off to now?
text_clean: Where's Kliff gone off to now?

text_raw: Kliff!
text_clean: Kliff!

text_raw: By the fucking ancestors!
text_clean: By the fucking ancestors!

text_raw: Where the fuck have you been? Nearly died of old age here.
text_clean: Where the fuck have you been? Nearly died of old age here.

text_raw: What the idiot means is,
text_clean: What the idiot means is,

text_raw: hesitation isn't really our style.
text_clean: hesitation isn't really our style.

text_raw: I'll help however I can.
text_clean: I'll help however I can.

text_raw: Right! So...
text_clean: Right! So...

text_raw: Who do I get to stick first?
text_clean: Who do I get to stick first?

text_raw: Kliff! What about me?
text_clean: Kliff! What about me?

text_raw: I'm as good as there! See you, lads.
text_clean: I'm as good as there! See you, lads.

text_raw: Consider it done.
text_clean: Consider it done.

text_raw: I'll speak with Torstein.
text_clean: I'll speak with Torstein.

text_raw:
The day we brought down Bastier... We saw a...
massive structure, floating towards the fort.
text_clean:
The day we brought down Bastier... We saw a...
massive structure, floating towards the fort.

text_raw: And that's not all. Caliburn's men are taking the prisoners there as well,
text_clean: And that's not all. Caliburn's men are taking the prisoners there as well,

text_raw: which means... It must all be connected.
text_clean: which means... It must all be connected.

text_raw: We all know that we have to fight against Caliburn,
text_clean: We all know that we have to fight against Caliburn,

text_raw: if we are to stop the coming catastrophe.
text_clean: if we are to stop the coming catastrophe.

text_raw: Countess Azerian, Duke Wells, and others will move soon.
text_clean: Countess Azerian, Duke Wells, and others will move soon.

text_raw: We can use it to our advantage.
text_clean: We can use it to our advantage.

text_raw: Where exactly?
text_clean: Where exactly?

text_raw: Hey!
text_clean: Hey!

text_raw: Shut up, this is serious.
text_clean: Shut up, this is serious.

text_raw: There is an outpost on the road to Fort Musket.
text_clean: There is an outpost on the road to Fort Musket.

text_raw: Beats me... Let's just take a break.
text_clean: Beats me... Let's just take a break.

text_raw: You're all here.
text_clean: You're all here.

text_raw: Bit of a skirmish with Caliburn.
text_clean: Bit of a skirmish with Caliburn.

text_raw: Got a good thrashing, but some fine folk patched me up.
text_clean: Got a good thrashing, but some fine folk patched me up.

text_raw: Naira, gather all of the Greymanes.
text_clean: Naira, gather all of the Greymanes.

text_raw: Oongka, contact Stefan in Calphade.
text_clean: Oongka, contact Stefan in Calphade.

text_raw: Once everyone's ready, let's assemble.
text_clean: Once everyone's ready, let's assemble.

text_raw: Damiane, do you know a good location?
text_clean: Damiane, do you know a good location?

text_raw: Damiane, can we count on support from Demeniss as well?
text_clean: Damiane, can we count on support from Demeniss as well?

text_raw: Inform Marquis Serkis of the situation.
text_clean: Inform Marquis Serkis of the situation.

text_raw: And I learned something important.
text_clean: And I learned something important.

text_raw: Caliburn and Myurdin are plotting something huge at Fort Musket.
text_clean: Caliburn and Myurdin are plotting something huge at Fort Musket.

text_raw: We must stop Caliburn's men at Fort Musket.
text_clean: We must stop Caliburn's men at Fort Musket.

text_raw: If we fail to do so, countless lives will be lost.
text_clean: If we fail to do so, countless lives will be lost.

text_raw: We can't do this alone...
text_clean: We can't do this alone...

text_raw: Alright, let's move.
text_clean: Alright, let's move.

text_raw: Mmm.
text_clean: Mmm.

text_raw: She will never be forgiven.
text_clean: She will never be forgiven.

text_raw: But none of us have the strength to oppose her...
text_clean: But none of us have the strength to oppose her...

text_raw: I'm glad you've come, stranger.
text_clean: I'm glad you've come, stranger.

text_raw: Do not be alarmed. I'm neither wraith nor corpse.
text_clean: Do not be alarmed. I'm neither wraith nor corpse.

text_raw: Merely a sorcerer... stripped of power, bound to this frame.
text_clean: Merely a sorcerer... stripped of power, bound to this frame.

text_raw: You seek the witch who would upset the balance of the world, do you not?
text_clean: You seek the witch who would upset the balance of the world, do you not?

text_raw: Hexe Marie...
text_clean: Hexe Marie...

text_raw: She plunders our bodies with vile sorcery,
text_clean: She plunders our bodies with vile sorcery,

text_raw: and shakes the order of the Abyss we've guarded for generations.
text_clean: and shakes the order of the Abyss we've guarded for generations.

text_raw: There is a temple, a key stone of this world, that holds the law of nature steady.
text_clean: There is a temple, a key stone of this world, that holds the law of nature steady.

text_raw: If you truly wish to restore balance,
text_clean: If you truly wish to restore balance,

text_raw: help that temple regain its strength.
text_clean: help that temple regain its strength.

text_raw: What are you?
text_clean: What are you?

text_raw: Aye. To set things back to their proper state.
text_clean: Aye. To set things back to their proper state.

text_raw: The order of the Abyss...?
text_clean: The order of the Abyss...?

text_raw: You've restored the sanctum.
text_clean: You've restored the sanctum.

text_raw: This place vexes those who hunger for chaos, like Hexe Marie.
text_clean: This place vexes those who hunger for chaos, like Hexe Marie.

text_raw: I sense her... hiding within her own domain, drawing strength in darkness.
text_clean: I sense her... hiding within her own domain, drawing strength in darkness.

text_raw: First, you must destroy the stone ward that masks her presence.
text_clean: First, you must destroy the stone ward that masks her presence.

text_raw: It will not be an easy battle.
text_clean: It will not be an easy battle.

text_raw: Keep cautious and vigilant.
text_clean: Keep cautious and vigilant.
